Templar Conspiracy

Uncover a mysterious Templar conspiracy in this point-and-click adventure. Explore richly detailed locations, examine objects, collect items, and solve environmental puzzles. Combine inventory items and interact with hotspots to progress through the story. Your goal is to solve all puzzles across multiple locations and reveal the truth behind the conspiracy.

Arrow Keys: Navigate between menu options and hotspots | Space: Examine/interact with selected hotspot or use inventory item | Z: Open/close inventory menu | Shift: Combine selected inventory items | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/unpause game | R: Restart to main menu
